inline.description: Inline error within the specific feature that failed
inline.usage: When only one feature is affected by the dependency failure

figmaNote: Distinguish from 503 — 424 means a specific dependency failed, not a full outage. Be specific about which service if known.

designSystemIntegrations.tailwind: class="bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 text-amber-800 p-4 rounded-lg"
